title: Support inserting package symbols underneath module symbols

features.name: package localparam shadowing via wildcard import
features.description: Code should include a package with localparam definitions that is wildcard-imported into a module which then defines a localparam with the same name as one from the package

features.name: synthesis translate off around package import
features.description: Code should include a wildcard package import statement wrapped in synthesis translate off/on pragma
